audit_categories_config.name: Visual Design
audit_categories_config.label: VISUAL DESIGN
audit_categories_config.description: Colors, typography, and use of whitespace
audit_categories_config.scoring_description: A thorough review of the foundational elements of design to determine how well a brand uses color, typography, whitespace. We even check for WCAG 2.1 accessibility requirements for color contrast.

audits.name: Color
audits.description: Color palette and accessibility of the colors used
audits.label: COLOR_MANAGEMENT

audits.name: Typography
audits.description: Clarity, consistency and legibility of text styles
audits.label: TYPOGRAPHY

audits.name: Branding
audits.description: Visibility and scalability of your logo
audits.label: BRANDING

audit_categories_config.name: Information Architecture
audit_categories_config.label: INFORMATION_ARCHITECTURE
audit_categories_config.description: Content structure, menus, links and buttons
audit_categories_config.scoring_description: Reviews content and website structure for SEO, dead links, performance, as well as the number of pages a user has to go to find any given piece of information

audits.name: SEO
audits.description: The meta data that needs to be mentioned about a web page
audits.label: SEO

audits.name: Menu Analysis
audits.description: Evaluation of the menu heirarchy, placement, and complexity
audits.label: MENU_ANALYSIS

audits.name: Performance
audits.description: How fast the content loads on webpages
audits.label: PERFORMANCE

audit_categories_config.name: Content
audit_categories_config.label: CONTENT
audit_categories_config.scoring_description: Evaluates written content for accessibility requirements around radability. We also review images and other media for relevance to written content

audits.name: Imagery
audits.description: Check that images reflect your written content and are SEO friendly
audits.label: IMAGERY

audits.name: Videos
audits.description: Evaluation of videos and their accessibility
audits.label: VIDEOS

audits.name: Audio
audits.description: Evaluation of Audio tracks and their accessibility
audits.label: AUDIO
